home.title: Abu Alkhattab Perfumes
home.subtitle: Perfumes inspired by the South for over 15 years

about.title: About Us
about.p1: "Abu Alkhattab Perfumes - Inspired by the South" is the first Nubian brand specializing in crafting all types of Khomra, incense, dilka, and high-quality imported aromatic products.
about.p2: Over 15 years of experience, by the grace of God. Every product is handmade from our hearts to yours. May you always be fragranced in your homes.

featured.title: Featured Selections
featured.subtitle: An exclusive collection of our finest handcrafted products.

bridal.title: Bridal Packages
bridal.subtitle: Exclusive preparations for your special night by Om Abdulrahman Alkhattab

g1.title: First Bridal Package
features: 6 types of Khomra in 1/4 kg bottles of your choice.
Half kg jar of imported premium Sandalwood incense.
Small jar of perfumed Mahlab Dilka of your choice.

g2.title: Second Bridal Package
features: 6 types of Khomra in 1/4 kg bottles of your choice.
1 kg jar of imported premium Sandalwood incense.
Large jar of perfumed Mahlab Dilka of your choice.

g3.title: Third Bridal Package
features: Can upgrade to 1/2 kg bottles instead of 1/4 kg.
Increase the amount of Incense, Khomra, and Dilka.

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.subtitle: We are proud of your trust. See what our valued customers say about our premium products.
